name: AggregateCommitPolicy
documentation:
Controls when aggregate changes are committed and whether multiple commits in the same completion phase may run
 concurrently.

methods.name: afterBatch
methods.documentation: Returns whether this policy commits at batch completion rather than handler completion.

methods.name: async
methods.documentation: Returns whether this policy allows commits from the same completion phase to run concurrently.

enumConstants.name: ASYNC_AFTER_BATCH
enumConstants.documentation:
Start commits at the end of the current message batch and wait for all started commits before the batch
 completion phase finishes.

enumConstants.name: ASYNC_AFTER_HANDLER
enumConstants.documentation: Start commits after every handler and wait for all started commits at the end of the handler completion phase.

enumConstants.name: DEFAULT
enumConstants.documentation: Resolve the policy from the active Fluxzero defaults version or explicit application properties.

enumConstants.name: SYNC_AFTER_BATCH
enumConstants.documentation: Commit at the end of the current message batch and wait for each commit before continuing.

enumConstants.name: SYNC_AFTER_HANDLER
enumConstants.documentation: Commit after every handler and wait for that commit before the handler completion phase finishes.
